title: Metadata Schema for Atlas Vivo MILK
description: Schema for validating metadata.json files in Atlas Vivo MILK repositories

title.description: Title of the dataset or resource

description.description: Detailed description of the dataset or resource

license.description: License for the dataset or resource

keywords.description: Keywords or tags for the dataset or resource

creators.description: Authors or creators of the dataset or resource

version.description: Version of the dataset or resource

datePublished.description: Publication date of the dataset or resource

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the dataset or resource

relatedIdentifiers.description: Related identifiers (e.g., other DOIs or resources)
